title: Balen Shah to take oath as Nepal PM today; releases 'Jay Mahakali' rap song ahead of swearing-in | Watch
description: Balendra Shah is all set to be sworn in as the youngest Prime Minister of Nepal today, days after leading his party to a stunning electoral victory. His latest rap song, coupled with a message of unity, has resonated with millions, marking a shift in Nepal's political landscape post Gen-Z uprising.
